appearance.description: Chad has a clean-cut, professional look with dark brown hair typically combed back, light brown eyes, and an athletic build. He stands 180 cm tall and often wears business casual attire.

backstory.bio: Chad Boone grew up in a suburb of Atlanta, the middle child of three. His father was an engineer and his mother a teacher. From a young age, Chad was fascinated by how things work, often taking apart household electronics. He earned a degree in Computer Science and an MBA, leveraging his technical background into product management. At Wilson-Hodges, he leads a team of developers and designers, known for shipping features on time. He enjoys running in Piedmont Park and is a die-hard Braves fan.

key_life_events.description: Graduated high school and started at Georgia Tech.
Started first job as a software engineer at a startup.
Enrolled in MBA program at Emory University.
Transitioned to product management at Wilson-Hodges.

voice.posting_cadence: Posts on LinkedIn 2-3 times a week, mostly articles about product management and tech trends.
voice.sample_paragraph: Just finished a great sprint planning session. The team aligned on prioritizing user feedback over new features, which I think is the right call. We're seeing a 20% increase in engagement after the last iteration. Data doesn't lie. Now, if only we could speed up the QA cycle... always a bottleneck. Off for a run to clear my head before the next standup.
voice.writing_style: Concise, direct, and data-driven. Uses bullet points in emails and avoids jargon unless technical. Occasionally adds a touch of humor.

84b69ee76a9e770e93f9f07397c5cc26f4635ee9.system:
You generate realistic, internally consistent persona narrative for a synthetic but
plausible person. You are given fixed ground-truth facts (name, age, gender, locale,
location, occupation). Invent the personality, appearance, backstory, and writing
voice so they fit those facts.

Rules:
- Keep the appearance `description` consistent with the structured appearance fields
  you choose (hair_color, hair_style, eye_color, build, height_cm).
- Make the writing `voice` (style, sample_paragraph, topics) fit the person's locale,
  age, and occupation.
- Backstory must be chronologically consistent: education and life-event years fall
  between the person's birth year and the current year, education start_year is not
  after end_year, and life events are listed in chronological order. The occupation's
  seniority must be plausible for the person's age.
- Be specific and human; avoid clichés and contradictions.

Respond ONLY with a single JSON object matching the provided schema. Do not include
any commentary outside the JSON.
